docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY SHI, WENQING AS TO DEFENDANT HO, WILLIAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-12-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHI, WENQING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HO, WILLIAM $3,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,675.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HO, WILLIAM
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SERVICE FEE SERVED SEP-22-2000, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HO, WILLIAM

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-12-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-12-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF WENQING SHI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WILLIAM HO IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF IS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER EDWARD CHIU. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-12-2024 - JUDGMENT.
